mega.contact_desc: Quick contact, inquiry or arrangement for a presentation of solutions and strategies.
mega.select_service: Select a core service on the left to see subcategories.

footer.made_with: Made with strategy, storytelling & strong coffee in Samobor. ☕

hero.description: Access premium creative and strategic talent that integrates seamlessly with your business, precisely when, and how you need it.

about.title: What We Do
about.subtitle: We combine brand strategy, web design and content to build creative systems - not one-off campaigns. Pick what you need, or plug us in as your ongoing team.
about.branding_desc: Build clarity, consistency and a voice people remember.
about.web_desc: Websites and booking experiences designed to convert - not just exist.
about.content_desc: Content that compounds: social, email, campaigns and analytics.
about.ai_desc: Turn photos into cinematic stories. Faster, smarter, and finally affordable.

work.title: Who We Create For
work.subtitle: We work with forward-thinking businesses across tourism, health, beauty, charter and boutique industries - keeping them visible, trustworthy and alive.
work.tourism_desc: For brands that host the world. We help villas, boutique hotels, rental agencies, and yacht charters boost bookings and visibility.
work.learning_desc: For brands that educate professionals to reach their goals. Complete marketing funnel services to capture, nurture and convert leads into course sales.
work.health_desc: For brands that build trust through care. From clinics to pharma and beauty — clarity, empathy, credibility.
work.local_desc: For makers, doers and dreamers. Authentic identities and digital presence for independent brands.
work.stat_revenue: in revenue - helped achieved for clients in driving their portfolios
work.stat_video: hours of video materials edited, animated and postproduced

cta.title: Marketing Excellence That Works On Your Terms
cta.description: Because great marketing doesn't stop — it evolves. Whether you need a website that books guests, a video that tells your story, or a full creative system that scales with you — we're here to help your brand stay relevant, consistent and alive.

partners.title: Brands We Partner With
partners.subtitle: From luxury tourism to local craftsmanship - we work with brands that value strategy, creativity and measurable outcomes.
